allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://tcgtracking.com/tcgapi/v1/1/sets" -Method Get -ErrorAction Stop; $r.sets | Sort-Object -Property released_on -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | Format-Table id, abbreviation, name, released_on, product_count -AutoSize)
PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://tcgtracking.com/tcgapi/v1/1/sets" -Method Get -ErrorAction Stop; $r.sets[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3; "---"; "TOTAL SETS: $\($r.sets.Count\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://tcgtracking.com/tcgapi/v1/1/sets" -Method Get -ErrorAction Stop; $r.sets | Where-Object { $_.published_on -and \([datetime]$_.published_on\) -le \(Get-Date\) } | Sort-Object -Property { [datetime]$_.published_on } -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | Format-Table id, abbreviation, name, published_on, sku_count -AutoSize)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://tcgtracking.com/tcgapi/v1/1/sets" -Method Get -ErrorAction Stop; $r.sets | Where-Object { $_.abbreviation -and -not $_.is_supplemental -and $_.product_count -gt 200 -and $_.product_count -lt 600 -and $_.published_on -and \([datetime]$_.published_on\) -le \(Get-Date\) } | Sort-Object -Property { [datetime]$_.published_on } -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | Format-Table id, abbreviation, name, published_on, product_count -AutoSize)

PowerShell($skus = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://tcgtracking.com/tcgapi/v1/1/sets/24601/skus" -Method Get -ErrorAction Stop; "FIELDS ON ROOT:"; \($skus | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty\).Name -join ", "; "---"; "PRODUCT COUNT: $\($skus.products.Count\)"; "---"; "FIRST PRODUCT \(shape\):"; $skus.products[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6)

PowerShell($set = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://tcgtracking.com/tcgapi/v1/1/sets/24601" -Method Get -ErrorAction Stop; "FIELDS:"; \($set | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty\).Name -join ", "; "---"; "First product:"; $set.products[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4)
